title.en: Terran, the realm of the endless seams.

content.en:
For many human race peak realm gods, it is too difficult to comprehend the power of the superdimension, and those peak realm gods of the supreme forces have no way to comprehend the power of the superdimensional without endless years.

And Ye Tian also took out a lot of knowledge about other realms, and he also knew that most of the half-step transcendent realms in the outside world had transformed their physical bodies, and they had no hope of breaking through to the extradimensional realm, and the extradimensional realms were still very rare.

And if you don't break through to the half-step extradimensional realm, once you fuse the extradimensional things, you will gradually be assimilated into the extradimensional in the future, and you will fall and die.

But if it is fused with the extradimensional bloodline, then the impact of extradimensional assimilation will be minimal.

So, even if they can't break through the extradimensional realm, at least they don't have the risk of falling in the future!

The point is that the Peak Realm God of the Human Race has exchanged the method of domain dragon transformation and has begun to cultivate.

"Five, eight, seven" and the Black Scale Domain Dragon Blood Bloodline Seeds are limited, with the current number of peak realm gods of the human race, it is definitely far from enough, and Ye Tian allows these peak realm gods to exchange loans, if it is a little later, there is no way to exchange them for the Black Scale Domain Dragon Blood Bloodline Seeds.

Therefore, those peak realm gods who didn't think they had any hope of breaking through to the extradimensional realm directly exchanged for the Black Scale Domain Dragon Bloodline Seed and the Domain Dragon Transformation Method.

In a short period of time, all those Black Scale Domain Dragon Blood Seeds were exchanged.

Although they will need to pay off their debts for countless years to come, at least their strength will be much stronger.

......

Terran, the realm of the endless seams.

A mansion.

This is the mansion of Ye Xuanying, the peak realm god, he is the heir of the Ye family, with the help of Ye Tian Ancestor, plus his talent is good, naturally he has broken through to the peak realm god realm early, and now the twelfth eternal realm spirit has been condensed.

Ye Tian Ancestor gave the human race too many extra-dimensional resources, so there were not a few peak realm gods who had condensed the twelve eternal realm spirits of the human race, but most of them could not advance an inch.

I can't improve my cultivation, I can't comprehend the power of the extradimensionality, and I don't dare to casually break into the Void of Death.

It can be said that they don't usually practice much, as if they have lost their desire for everything.

But now, he has exchanged the Black Scale Domain Dragon Bloodline Seed and the Domain Dragon Transformation Method, even if he owes a huge amount of contribution points, there is still hope that he will pay it back slowly in the future.

Ye Xuanying had already understood the method of transforming the domain dragon, and now it was time to use the bloodline seed of the black scale domain dragon to transform the flesh.

He swallowed this Black Scale Domain Dragon Blood Bloodline Seed in one gulp, and then ran the Domain Dragon Transformation Method.

Rumble!!!!

His physical body began to transform, and the lines of the Black Scale Domain Dragon appeared on his body, and wisps of special extradimensional power penetrated into his whole body, as well as into the interior of the Eternal Dao Species.

With each passing moment, his physical body was strengthening.

The success rate of the domain dragon transformation method is not 100%, but after Ye Tian obtained the domain dragon transformation method, he perfected it again, and the success rate was at least eighty percent or more, plus some extra-dimensional resources to assist in the transformation of the physical body, the success rate was definitely more than ninety percent.

With such a success rate, if it still fails, it can only prove that it is too wasteful.

I don't know how long it has been, Ye Xuanying's transformation has been successful, and he has successfully completed the transformation, and he has the bloodline of the Black Scale Domain Dragon.

In an instant, he obtained part of the inheritance of the Black Scale Domain Dragon, and through the power of the Black Scale Dragon's bloodline and the secret techniques in the inheritance, he could connect with the creatures of other realms.

"What a terrifying ability!"

Ye Xuanying said excitedly.

Moreover, with the bloodline of the Black Scale Domain Dragon, the success rate of comprehending the power of the superdimensional in the future has increased by at least dozens of times!

Soon, he was out of the customs and reported to the Terran Temple as soon as possible, saying that he had fused the Black Scale Domain Dragon Blood Bloodline Seed and successfully possessed the Black Scale Domain Dragon Blood Bloodline.

After a period of time, Ye Xuanying came to a part of the human race, where there were some other peak realm gods who fused the dragon bloodline seeds of the Black Scale Domain.

And the task of these pinnacle realm gods is to be responsible for communicating with the terrans of other realms and delivering news, and this task can obtain contribution points for a long time, pay off debts faster, and even obtain a lot of extradimensional resources, which will help them comprehend the power of superdimensionality in the future and impact the half-step extradimensional realm.

......

Before you know it, another few extradimensional epochs have passed.

During this period of time, he used the information of the Sky Seeping Pavilion to obtain some Black Scale Domain Dragon Blood Bloodline Seeds, and also obtained some extradimensional resources.

Other than that.

The Terrans are constantly expanding, and the territory of 7,362 is undoubtedly not suitable for the Terrans... 0

As a result, Ye Tian used the Domain-Breaking Star Array organized by the Ice Ghost to transfer a large number of Terrans at a huge cost, sending these Terrans to some surrounding territories and occupying some territory.

The territories around these four areas don't even have extradimensional realms, and some territories only have a few half-step transcendent realms at most, and Ye Tian can naturally easily sweep them.

And with these peak realm gods with the bloodline of the black scale domain dragon, it is not difficult for the peak realm gods of the human race in the major territories to communicate information.

After all, the price paid to open the Domain-Breaking Boundary Star Array is very high, and every time you open it, even if you have a delimiting disk, it will cost you almost 30 million Gala Treasure Coins, and a peak realm god is not worth so many Gala Treasure Coins.

Therefore, the Domain-Breaking Boundary Star Array is rarely opened.

......

"The progress of refining the superdimensional body is six percent, and there is no superdimensional origin bead, just relying on other resources to refine the superdimensional body, the progress is relatively slow!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, his extradimensional body was still stronger than the extradimensional bodies of other half-step extradimensional realms, after all, he had completed the breakthrough with a perfect extradimensional realm, and his foundation far surpassed that of other half-step extradimensional realms.

Therefore, every time his superdimensional body refining progress improves, his strength will skyrocket.

However, at 0.9, he still couldn't break into the palace of the Ice Ghost Organization's extradimensional realm ruins.

Six Thousand Territory. []

Polar Yang Realm.

At this time, a message was transmitted, and many half-step extradimensional realms knew about it.

Ye Tian naturally knew this information for the first time, and after hearing about it, he was immediately shocked.

"The Seven Thousand and One Territories have been destroyed????"

Ye Tian was shocked.

You must know that any territory is incomparably huge, and the Death Void alone is incomparably vast, and there may even be extradimensional creatures hidden in the extradimensional realm inside.

It is not easy to destroy a superdimensional realm, at least a half-step extradimensional realm cannot destroy a superdimensional realm, at least it must be a superdimensional realm to be able to destroy a superdimensional realm.

And destroying an extradimensional territory, the extradimensional realm can't be done.
